consumer_instructions: Work items where status=='open'. For each: source a replacement matching product_intent, browser-verify it is live + In Stock + correct product (space Amazon requests 5-10s apart), then write the proposed new destination into resolution.proposed_destination and set status='proposed'. Do NOT edit affiliates.json or deploy — Jeff reviews and pushes. Reconcile against affiliate-governance.json and lifecycle.json before proposing (a slug may already be owned/retired there). If no good replacement exists, set status='retire-recommended' with a reason.
